input.description:
Use this tool when:
The user asks to label, tag, or categorize messages or threads.
Label application is part of an explicit organization request.
Its important to call list_labels always before calling this tool to correctly identify the labels to add.

properties.label: Messages
properties.name: messages
properties.hint: Provide a list of gmail message IDs. Max 10 at a time. Either atleast one message ID or thread ID should be present.

properties.label: Threads
properties.name: threads
properties.hint: Provide a list of gmail thread IDs. Max 10 at a time. Either atleast one message ID or thread ID should be present.

properties.label: Labels
properties.name: labels
properties.hint: Provide a list of string of Gmail label IDs to apply. Use Gmail label IDs (for example: INBOX, UNREAD, STARRED, or custom label IDs), not display names. To retrieve all available label IDs, call the list_labels tool and use the returned id values.
